title: lessingianthus constrictus
intro: Lessingianthus constrictus, also known as the Brazilian button or Lessingia, is a flowering plant native to the southeastern United States and Brazil. The plant's medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lessingianthus constrictus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Lessingianthus constrictus often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to create teas, salves, or topical applications for various health concerns.
